allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "C:\\Users\\joltc\\Desktop\\este-portal"; node node_modules\\typescript\\bin\\tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/salon/1" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; \($body -match "極楽の宙"\) -and \($body -match "アロマリラクゼーション"\) -and \($body -match "8,000"\) -and \($body -match "サロン一覧へ戻る"\) -and \($body -match "博多・住吉"\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/salon/7" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; \($body -match "La Mer Blanc"\) -and \($body -match "出張専門"\) -and \($body -match "9,000"\); $r10 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/salon/10" -UseBasicParsing; $body10 = $r10.Content; \($body10 -match "Spa Maison"\) -and \($body10 -match "スウェディッシュ"\))
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/salon/99" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $r.StatusCode } else { "404 or error \(expected\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; $idx = $body.IndexOf\("ラビリンス"\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { $body.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-200\), 400\) } else { "ラビリンス not found" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; $positions = @\(\); $i = 0; while \(\($i = $body.IndexOf\("お休み", $i\)\) -ge 0\) { $positions += $i; $i++ }; foreach \($p in $positions\) { Write-Output "--- pos $p ---"; Write-Output $body.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$p-150\), 300\) })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], r['conclusion'], r.get\('output',{}\).get\('summary',''\)\) for r in data.get\('check_runs',[]\)]")

PowerShell(Set-Location 'C:\\Users\\joltc\\Desktop\\este-portal'; $result = npx eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx 2>&1; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host "Exit: $exitCode"; $result | Where-Object { $_ -match "error" -and $_ -notmatch "warning" } | Select-Object -First 20)
